mapper.insert:
insert into teacher
teacher_no, name, gender, college_id, title, phone, email, password,
values
#{teacherNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{collegeId}, #{title}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{password},
mapper.delete:
delete from teacher where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select t.id as teacherId, t.teacher_no, t.name, t.gender, t.college_id, c.college_name, t.title, t.phone, t.email , t.status, t.account_status, t.create_time, t.update_time from teacher t left join college c on t.college_id = c.id where t.id = #{id}

select t.id as teacherId, t.teacher_no, t.name, t.gender, t.college_id, c.college_name, t.title, t.phone, t.email , t.status, t.account_status, t.password, t.create_time, t.update_time from teacher t left join college c on t.college_id = c.id where t.teacher_no = #{teacherNo} and t.status = '在职'

select t.id as teacherId, t.teacher_no, t.name, t.gender, t.college_id, c.college_name, t.title, t.phone, t.email , t.status, t.account_status, t.create_time, t.update_time from teacher t left join college c on t.college_id = c.id where t.id in
#{id}
